content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K006
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Quarterly Check-in
Date: August 8, 2023
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO)

James Okafor: Alex, good to hear from you. You're one of our smoothest onboards — your team was live in under two weeks.

Alex Nguyen: We had strong internal motivation. Our clients were waiting for the reporting upgrade. The white-label dashboards have been well received — a couple of clients have specifically complimented the professional look of the reports, which reflects well on us.

James Okafor: That's great to hear. Any feature gaps surfacing as you onboard more client accounts?

Alex Nguyen: Two things. First, SSO — we have enterprise clients who require SSO and right now we're managing credentials manually, which doesn't scale. Second, we'd benefit from a dedicated CSM as we grow. Right now it's just me handling any questions from your end, and as we expand I'd like a named contact.

James Okafor: On SSO — it's on the roadmap. I'll get a more specific timeline from our product team. On the CSM — we typically assign dedicated CSMs at accounts over $60K ARR. You're at $36K right now but growing. Let's revisit that conversation when you're closer to that threshold.

Alex Nguyen: Fair. We expect to add 8 to 10 new managed services clients in the next 12 months, so I think we'll get there.

James Okafor: I'll be tracking it. I want to make sure you have the support you need as you scale.
